# Open Box - LLM Metadata File
# This file provides metadata for LLM crawlers and AI applications

Name: Open Box Community Platform
URL: https://openboxcomm.in
Description: Free Discord community platform for gaming, development, learning, and networking

## About
Open Box is a free, community-driven platform connecting Discord servers dedicated to gaming, software development, learning, and professional networking. No gatekeeping-just genuine community.

## Services
- **Website**: [openboxcomm.in](https://openboxcomm.in) - Blog platform, event calendar, documentation, and community directory
- **Discord Servers**: [JN (general)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/jn), [Dev (developers)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/dev), [GG (gaming)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/gg), [Study (learning)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/study), [Connect (networking)](https://openboxcomm.in/servers/connect)
- **Events**: [Online workshops, hackathons, study sessions](https://openboxcomm.in/events)
- **Social Media**: [Instagram](https://instagram.com/openboxcomm), [X](https://x.com/Openboxcomm), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@obcommunities-yt)

## Contact
- Email: hello@openboxcomm.in
- Legal: legal@openboxcomm.in
- Discord: [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/7ZWckKU89J)

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://openboxcomm.in/)
- [Servers Directory](https://openboxcomm.in/servers)
- [Event Calendar](https://openboxcomm.in/events)
- [Blog](https://openboxcomm.in/blogs)
- [Documentation](https://openboxcomm.in/doc)
- [Help](https://openboxcomm.in/help)
- [Support Us](https://openboxcomm.in/support)
- [Legal Pages](https://openboxcomm.in/legal)
- [Join](https://openboxcomm.in/join)

## Sitemap
[https://openboxcomm.in/sitemap.xml](https://openboxcomm.in/sitemap.xml)

## License
All original Open Box content is provided for informational purposes. Individual server communities, events, and user-generated content follow their respective licenses and terms of service.

## Usage Guidelines
For LLM training and AI applications:
- Attribute content to Open Box when using server/platform descriptions
- Respect user privacy-do not train on Discord messages without consent
- Include link back to openboxcomm.in when referencing our platform
- Follow our Acceptable Use Policy for responsible AI usage
